reviews.review_description: The Oculus is the place to be for Roguelikes!!  I'm having a blast with you game!  Can't wait to see the final result.  Really fun roguelike, thanks guys.

developer_response.body: Hey Solvangman805, thank you for the review. Would love to hear more from you. You can join our discord - https://dsc.gg/lastmechstanding - and say hi to the devs and the creators of the game. :)

reviews.review_description:
Nice wave shooter its only one level then it kicks you back to main menu. I played it twice cuz I thought it was a mistake but sadly it's just 1 level.

Pros- I like wave shooters and swords so I had fun. I especially enjoyed throwing my sword boomerang style.the opening cutscene was toptier I was really surprised when I noticed the game is only 1lvl 5mins long cuz the intro was so epic. Also nice menu style.

Cons- I wish there was more space to move around a little and differant enemy types thats very important in a waveshooter. Also the map had a weird design 🤔  i didn't like it very much

Crashland is the best vr waveshooter ever made, because of the variety of enemy types and maps. I wish that more games would try to emulate and improve on that.

Anyways  I have high hopes for this game to turn out 5stars once it's completed, it was fun slicing aliens up and the robot hands was cool

developer_response.body:
Hi Czar.Peace.Ya, thanks for taking the time out to write the review, appreciate the honest feedback so much. There was a glitch in the first level where the game stopped for a while, but that has since been fixed. We are so sorry for that. Ours is a small indie team but we pride ourselves on making the best possible experience for all our players.

There are a lot more enemy types coming up in the later stages, we were planning a softer approach in the early levels to get players used to the game. 

Do try the latest update once again and let us know what you think. You can join us on discord - https://dsc.gg/lastmechstanding - and speak to us directly. We need your feedback to determine the direction forward! Cheers!

- Devs at Crimson Forge

reviews.review_description: imo this game is fun for maybe 20-30 mins max then just gets boring it’s repetitive and the sword just looks dumb and you can’t move

I'm surprised this is an app lab game. I've been waiting for a game that makes me feel like I'm in a Jaeger ( mech from Pacific rim). This game helps out a little, and I was kinda disappointed you can't move around but it's still fun and extremely hard when you start out. I love the concept of the game but I'm kinda sad this is only in beta. I hope this game gets finished soon, and I hope it's free cuz I'm getting tired of spending my money. And idk if the developers noticed, but in one of the maps in the first level. There is a little menu behind you that lets you spawn some creatures that aren't out yet. If you like wave games, then this is the game for you.( Hey I would love to be a beta tester but I don't have discord so is that still ok?)

developer_response.body: Hey, if you want to be a tester, please email us at support@crimson-forge.com

reviews.review_description: I haven't tried the game yet but I know it's going to be the best game ever on app store

This is freaking awesome! It's a great core to be built on and I look forward to the full release. The only reason I rate it four Stars is that it needs a bit of polish and some quality of life changes.

Love the game but I came across a bug that wouldn't let me progress any further no matter the save. The bug is on the third level canister it is bugged out of the map! When I unlocked it was just not there but the interaction area is still there but if you grab it it will not appear. I have used every save slot and had this bug every time sadly I can't progress but this needs to be fixed. Besides that I love the game and can't wait to finish it if possible!

developer_response.body: Hey DrOtto, the game currently is in open beta and playable to stage 2. thanks so much for your feedback and we are glad you enjoyed playing it. Join us on our discord channel dsc.gg/lastmechstanding to give feedback and talk directly to us!

reviews.review_description: The game is good but when I think of self in a mech with giant legs I expected my self to be able to walk,I mean that doesn't make sense pls add walking and the enemy's could use some better designs
Basic at this point but great potential.

developer_response.body: Hi John, thank for the review!! Yeah it's a few levels at the moment, we're still in open beta and would like to hear from the VR community. You can join our discord - https://dsc.gg/lastmechstanding and say hi!

reviews.review_description:
Mechs are cool! Hence, the download. The trailer and screenshots looked fantastic, and it is free, so it seemed like a no-brainer.

This game got me pumped from the start! Very cool cinematic intro. I rarely get excited by or emotionally invested in VR game storylines but the setup in this actually had me feeling like I was the protagonist in a movie about saving humanity from alien invaders! What a great start!

However, it was completely downhill after that. When the actual gameplay started, the flaws came to life.

This game is essentially a wave shooter. During the first wave, which is kind of like a tutorial, I started running around a little, using the left joystick (NOT my body). Nope, the game wasn't having it. Similar to the dojos from the Vader Immortal series, a little signal showed that I was out of the designated play zone. However, this was FAR more sensitive than in Vader. I looked down and saw a blue glowing circle. It was TINY!!! Whenever I moved my body (headset) significantly, AND/OR when I moved the joystick, I was out of the zone. The screen went black with the prompt to return to the play area, all the while being molested by the baddies. I thought this was a bug or glitch at first but soon realized it was oddly by design.

Also in the intro, I initially grabbed the sword with my left hand, thinking I would get a gun for my right. Nope, just the sword. No big deal; I would just switch it to my dominant right hand. Not possible. I couldn't let it go to switch hands. Weak.

After dying in the intro, which I believe is a scripted inevitability, the screen glitched up and locked for a good 30 seconds or so. Not a good sign. Then the game righted itself and I was transported back to headquarters. When in headquarters, I was not able to click the weapon selection buttons with my fingers, but only the back of my hand. Such clumsy controls. Finally I was able to upgrade my sword (not a choice) and move on to the first level. Finally, I thought I was moving on to the real game!

Disappointingly, the first level was...just another wave shooter. The worst part? Again, I couldn't really move...at all. Yes, you can swing your arms, but if your headset moves more than 6 to 8 inches, you'll receive a notification that you're out of the play area. Move that mech back into the 14-inch-diameter circle of play, sergeant! The game doesn't pause, either...you continue to get throttled by the naughty arthropods while you're awkwardly trying to position your head directly above the circle.

Uninstall. Such a shame - this looked really cool.

developer_response.body:
Hi Quackbirth, Thanks for taking the time to download the game and write this comprehensive and honest review of our game. I am so sorry the experience didn't match your expectations. We may be a small indie team but we try our best to give our players a great experience.

Just to update you we have fixed some of the glitches you mentioned and some we are still working on. 

We take all your points seriously and would love to hear more from you. As Last Mech Standing is still an open beta, we need feedback from you and the community to improve our game and set the direction forward. Feel free to reach out to us via our discord channel - https://dsc.gg/lastmechstanding.

Looking forward to seeing you!

- Devs at Crimson Forge

reviews.review_description: For this to be an open beta/ demo, the game feels almost fully whole (for what you can play of it)... the fighting is seamless, upgrades are attainable yet challenging for some of the hunts... a couple of bugs to iron out, but this is just the demo!  I think the previous reviewer must not have known that.  Can't wait to see the full release!

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the review! Happy you enjoyed it. Please join us on discord dsc.gg/lastmechstanding and give us more feedback and chat directly with the devs!

reviews.review_description: Definitely tell a lot of effort was put into making this game. Great start to the game and excited to see where it goes.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks so much for the review! Please join us on discord dsc.gg/lastmechstanding and give us more feedback and chat directly with the devs!

reviews.review_description: They said they patched the glitch but it still won’t load wast of 2 gigabytes in my opinion

developer_response.body: Hi Finlay, thanks for the review. Can you try to update the app? Or relaunch it? It should not have any issues after the intro cutscene.

reviews.review_description: This game is really great for an app lab game. the graphics are great, the gameplay is smooth, and you can kinda just let of some steam just by playing and finding out what weapon combinations suit your play style. The only reason i’m not giving it 5 is because, whenever i complete the refugee level it looks like a new capsule is going to be there but it’s just particles. i can grab whatever is there but i can’t do anything with it. i don’t know if it’s doing this because it’s a demo or if its a glitch. if anyone has some info about it i would appreciate it as the game seems really fun and i wanna continue playing it.

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for the review. The game is in open beta and playable to stage 2. Happy you are enjoying playing it. Please join us on discord dsc.gg/lastmechstanding and give us more feedback and chat directly with the devs!

reviews.review_description:
Im really enjoying this one. For starters there’s a story on it, and even if it’s simple and small, the dev deserves everything for going the extra mile. The mech can be upgraded and there’s lots of extras to unlock by completing quests. There isn’t a big variety of enemies and many of them are reskins but they are easy to recognize and memorable so they work really well.
I’m looking forward to release, keep an eye on this one!
The second I load in, the cutscene plays and then it crashes.
